rulings.Case Title: BILLY S. JOHNSON VS. ADVOCATE MINES, LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Augment Expert Witness Disclosure To Include Albert J. Ferrari
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, January 19, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to augment expert witness disclosure is granted. Mr. Ferrari may be added to plaintiff¿s expert list and can testify at trial regarding the interpretation and meaning of documents received by plaintiff from the Fort Wayne depository provided that he possesses the requisite qualifications to do so. The determination of whether any opinions or other testimony offered by Mr. Ferrari are within the permissible scope of his testimony and whether Mr. Ferrari possesses the requisite qualifications to testify to those opinions and other testimony will be decided by the trial judge and are not being decided on this motion. = (220/HEK)
